summary: Inspected the repository state on `features/devil-horns` and confirmed it is a git worktree in a non-rebasing state. The ticket changes are present as uncommitted modifications in `app.js`, `styles.css`, and `tests/calculator.test.js`, with runner metadata updates in `.codex-bin/git` and `.codex-last-message.json`. The implementation adds a `calculator--devilish` state when the display is exactly `666`, styles animated devil horns, and extends the calculator test to verify the horns appear and disappear as the display changes.
commitMessage: Add devil horns when the calculator displays 666
testingInstructions:
From `/Users/robertandrews/.codex/runner-workspaces/ticket-7-3llF8d/worktree`, run:

```bash
npm ci
npm run test
npm run build
```

Manual check:

```bash
python3 -m http.server 4180
```

Open `http://localhost:4180`, enter `666`, and confirm the calculator grows devil horns. Delete a digit or clear the display and confirm the horns disappear.
